name: Power Minerals Limited
analysis: PNN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 52% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1450, stop A$0.1213, target A$0.1600 (0.63:1) — then trail it.
